title: Sell WBTC - Open App
meta_description: sell wbtc with the official Uniswap app link; verify the WBTC contract, review the quote, slippage, gas, and wallet approval.
hero_h2: Convert Wrapped Bitcoin into USDC in one app flow
hero_lead: sell wbtc opens the official Uniswap swap flow with Wrapped Bitcoin preselected, giving holders a direct place to review the route, price impact, slippage, gas, and wallet approval before converting.
what_is: WBTC is Wrapped Bitcoin, an ERC-20 token representation of BTC on Ethereum; the official WBTC site is the primary project destination. This page opens Uniswap with WBTC preselected for a token swap and does not custody funds.

how.d: Use the CTA to load app.uniswap.org with WBTC as the input asset and USDC as the output asset.
Connect a wallet you control and make sure the selected network is Ethereum before approving anything.
Check output amount, route, price impact, slippage, and estimated gas; change the output token if needed.
Approve WBTC only if the app asks, then confirm the swap in your wallet after reviewing the final transaction.

points.p: The canonical Ethereum WBTC token is 0x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599; compare it on Etherscan before any approval.
This landing page only routes to app.uniswap.org; funds stay in your wallet until you sign a transaction.
Quotes, liquidity, gas, and price impact change block by block, so use the app's current numbers instead of cached page text.

faq.q: How do I sell WBTC from a self-custody wallet?
faq.a: Open the app link, connect on Ethereum, select an amount, review the quote, slippage, gas, and route, then confirm in your wallet. The swap only executes after you sign.

faq.q: Is sell WBTC the same as redeeming WBTC for BTC?
faq.a: No. A DEX swap converts WBTC into another Ethereum asset. Redemption to BTC is a separate merchant or custodian process, and requirements can vary.

faq.q: What contract should I check before I sell WBTC?
faq.a: Check the Ethereum WBTC contract at 0x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599 before approving a wallet transaction.

faq.q: Can I sell WBTC for USDC instead of ETH?
faq.a: Yes. The app link is prefilled for WBTC to USDC on Ethereum, and you can change the output token inside Uniswap before signing.

faq.q: Are fees fixed when I sell WBTC?
faq.a: No. Network gas, route, liquidity, price impact, and any app-displayed fees can change, so review the final quote before confirming.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify app.uniswap.org before connecting a wallet. Educational information only, not financial advice.
